title: [cross-impl] SCHC + RPL test vector / byte order mismatch
description: test/vectors/schc_compression.json updated in 03c1fd4b5 but Rust lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:214 (DAO D=1, lollipop, SignedDaoEnvelope 48B sig), lichen/schc and python/src/lichen/schc/headers.py:556, Zephyr schc.c and rpl_messages.h diverge on padding, residue, IPv6/ICMP/RPL_DIO/DAO byte ordering and compression rules. Violates identical output requirement. See routing.rs:196, schc_compression.json:10-49. Same algorithm different behavior. P1.
